title: Toilet Brush, 2 Pack Bathroom Silicone Toilet Brushes and Holder Sets with No-Slip Long Plastic Handle and Soft Flexible Bristles, Toilet Brushes with holders and Base for Anti-drip (White)
features: 🚽【Silicone Toilet Brush Set】: The silicon toilet brush and holder packed with a stable holder base, anti-drip protection, protect the Bathroom wall and floor clean without unpleasant odor.
🚽【Quick Drying Holder】: The toilet brush with an inter hollow design makes it difficult for bacteria to grow, and dry faster, avoiding unpleasant odors. your wc will be cleaner than ever

🚽【360°Deep Cleaning Every Dead Ends】: Silicone Toilet Brush is made of rubbery material that durable, the brush never wears out, does not deform. The soft flat toilet brush can enter the corners and crevices. Designed for deep cleaning on rims and other hard-to-reach places, and does not hurt the glaze of the toilet.

🚽【Easy to Cleaning & Light】: PP + TPR brush head, Instant wash, non-sticky, non-hair and no damage to glaze. After every time the product is cleaned, it is like a new product. Product size: 14.37 x 4.01 x 1.65 in, the small design makes it takes up less space in the bathroom

🚽【Non-Slip Handle & Easy to Use】: Ergonomic handles make it easier to clean and reducing cleaning time. The design of the long handle can prevent dirty hands during cleaning, make toilet cleaning more efficient and easy. Simple and elegant design is coordinated with your bathroom.
PLEASE NOTE: Wall stickers cannot be pasted on painted walls!
description: Product Description The compact size and wall-mounted setting of our toilet brush basically does not take up any space in the bathroom. Use our silicone toilet brush to light up our bathroom, your bathroom will look beautiful and clean, and make cleaning a pleasant and easy-to-clean experience! Specifications: Color: White Size: 14.37 x 4.01 x 1.65 Material: TPR+PP Install type: Floor standing/Wall mounting Weight: 430g Package Includes: 1 x Toilet Brush with Holder 2 x Wall Sticker Efficient & Clean Soft, flat toilet brushes fit into nooks and crannies. Deep-clean the rim without damaging the glaze of the toilet Handle design Ergonomic handles, To make cleaning easier, Reduce cleaning time Leakproof bottom design The toilet brush has sealed base， Dirty water will not leak to the bathroom floor, so that your bathroom is clean and odor-free Soft brush head TPR material brush,durable， strong cleaning power，no wear, no deformation， easy to clean and remove dirt Small, beautiful, save space 360° deep cleaning every dead corner Simple and convenient installation The simple and beautiful design is tailored to your bathroom.
